subject: Draft: 'Then and Now' - the Prairieview foundry
body:
Linda - first pass of the newsletter item below. I leaned on the 1923 ledger entries and the foundry photograph. Tell me where it runs long.

Andrew

subject: Grandpa's service records - a question for you
body:
Tom - for the family research, do you still have the folder with Grandpa Roberts's service papers? I am trying to pin the 1944 dates. No rush.

Dad

subject: A question on year-end gifting
body:
Paul - before the call, a question on the annual gifting amounts for Meg, Tom, and the grandchildren. I would like to keep it tidy for Phil at tax time.

Andrew
